INSERT INTO dimensions (id, competency_id, dimension_key, name, description, display_order) VALUES -- CG: Empathy & Compassion (4 dims) ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001101', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'perspective_taking', 'Perspective-taking', 'Ability to see things from the client''s point of view', 1), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001102', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'responsiveness', 'Responsiveness', 'Noticing and responding to unspoken needs or emotional cues', 2), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001103', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'adaptability_to_individuals', 'Adaptability to Individuals', 'Adjusting approach based on each person''s needs and preferences', 3), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001104', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'emotional_resilience', 'Emotional Resilience', 'Maintaining compassion over time without burning out', 4),

-- HK: Reliability & Work Ethic (5 dims) ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003201', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'consistency', 'Consistency', 'Showing up reliably and maintaining steady performance', 1), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003202', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'follow_through', 'Follow-through', 'Completing tasks fully without needing reminders', 2), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003203', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'ownership', 'Ownership', 'Taking responsibility for mistakes and making corrections', 3), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003204', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'communication', 'Communication', 'Proactively informing others when things change or go off track', 4), ('c0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003205', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'independent_work_management', 'Independent Work Management', 'Managing workload and priorities without direct supervision', 5),

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Seed rubric levels 1-5 for all 10 competencies (50 total)
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO rubric_levels (id, competency_id, level, label, description, min_dimensions_required, evidence_criteria) VALUES -- CG: Empathy & Compassion ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Task-focused responses with no mention of the person as an individual. Can''t describe a situation from a client''s perspective. No evidence across any dimension.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 2, 'Minimal', 'Expresses caring intentions but evidence limited to 1 dimension. May show basic responsiveness but can''t articulate client''s perspective or adapting approach. Follow-ups don''t surface depth.', 1, 'Evidence limited to 1 dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 3, 'Adequate', 'Demonstrates empathy in 2+ dimensions — e.g., noticed someone''s emotional state (perspective-taking) AND adjusted approach (responsiveness). Real, specific examples but may lack reflection.', 2, 'Real, specific examples. May lack reflection.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 4, 'Strong', 'Shows empathy across 3+ dimensions. Describes seeing things from client''s perspective, responding to unspoken needs, adjusting style. Some awareness of emotional resilience.', 3, 'Describes perspective, responding to unspoken needs, adjusting style.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 5, 'Exceptional', 'Pattern evidence across all 4 dimensions. Adapts per individual, reads nonverbal cues, navigates difficult moments. Articulates how they maintain compassion over time. Motivation feels deeply personal.', 4, 'Pattern evidence across all dimensions. Deeply personal motivation.'),
-- CG: Reliability & Accountability ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Vague or contradictory answers. Can''t provide examples in any dimension. May blame external factors without self-awareness.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 2, 'Minimal', 'Good intentions but evidence limited to 1 dimension. One weak example. Follow-ups on ownership/communication stay surface-level.', 1, 'Evidence limited to 1 dimension. One weak example.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 3, 'Adequate', 'Demonstrates reliability in 2+ dimensions — e.g., consistent attendance AND owning a mistake or communicating proactively. Specific, believable stories.', 2, 'Specific, believable stories in 2+ dimensions.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 4, 'Strong', 'Clear pattern across 3+ dimensions. Describes routines, handling mistakes with corrective action, communicating when things go off track. Understands others depend on them.', 3, 'Clear pattern. Understands impact on others.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 5, 'Exceptional', 'Evidence across all 4 dimensions. Treats reliability as a personal value. Articulates what they learned from failures. Understands impact on clients and team.', 4, 'Reliability as personal value. Learns from failures.'),
-- CG: Problem Solving Under Pressure ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000013001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Can''t describe handling an unexpected situation. Suggests they''d freeze, panic, or blindly escalate. No evidence across any dimension.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000013002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 2, 'Minimal', 'Describes a situation but only 1 dimension — typically just action. Can''t explain assessment, reasoning, or what they communicated.', 1, 'Typically just action without reasoning.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000013003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 3, 'Adequate', 'Demonstrates 2+ dimensions — assessed AND decided, or acted AND communicated. Real story, basic composure, single incident.', 2, 'Real story with basic composure. Single incident.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000013004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 4, 'Strong', 'Evidence across 3+ dimensions. Assessed before acting, made deliberate choice, kept others informed. Explains reasoning. Some reflection.', 3, 'Deliberate choices with communication. Some reflection.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000013005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 4 dimensions in high-pressure moments. Pattern evidence — the person others turn to. Articulates what they''d change. May describe improving processes.', 4, 'Pattern evidence. Person others turn to. Process improvement.'),
-- CNA: Patient Care Mindset ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000021001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Talks about the role in purely mechanical terms. No mention of patients as individuals. Can''t articulate why patient care requires a particular mindset.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000021002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 2, 'Minimal', 'Shows 1 dimension — usually a general statement about caring. Can''t demonstrate clinical awareness or describe maintaining patient dignity in practice.', 1, 'General caring statement. 1 dimension only.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000021003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 3, 'Adequate', 'Demonstrates 2+ dimensions — e.g., treating a patient with dignity AND showing awareness of why clinical details matter. Real, credible examples.', 2, 'Real, credible examples in 2+ dimensions.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000021004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 4, 'Strong', 'Evidence across 3+ dimensions. Proactive attentiveness, patient dignity in uncomfortable situations, clinical "why." Early signs of healthy emotional boundaries.', 3, 'Proactive attentiveness with clinical understanding.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000021005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 4 dimensions with pattern evidence. Proactively notices/reports, treats patients as individuals, understands clinical implications, maintains emotional boundaries. Reflects on growth.', 4, 'Pattern evidence across all dimensions. Reflects on growth.'),
-- CNA: Reliability & Accountability ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Vague or contradictory answers. Can''t provide examples in any dimension. May blame external factors without self-awareness.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 2, 'Minimal', 'Good intentions but evidence limited to 1 dimension. One weak example. Follow-ups on ownership/communication stay surface-level.', 1, 'Evidence limited to 1 dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 3, 'Adequate', 'Demonstrates reliability in 2+ dimensions. Specific, believable stories. May not show deep reflection on patient safety connection.', 2, 'Specific, believable stories. May lack patient safety reflection.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 4, 'Strong', 'Clear pattern across 3+ dimensions. Understands others depend on them. Shows awareness of patient safety downstream impact.', 3, 'Understands patient safety downstream impact.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 5, 'Exceptional', 'Evidence across all 4 dimensions. Treats reliability as a personal value. Understands impact on patients, teammates, and organization.', 4, 'Reliability as personal value. Full impact understanding.'),
-- CNA: Teamwork & Communication ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Can''t describe teamwork beyond "I get along with everyone." No examples of communicating info, receiving feedback, or navigating disagreements.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 2, 'Minimal', 'Surface-level team player claim. 1 dimension only. Can''t provide a real example when pressed.', 1, 'Surface-level claim. 1 dimension only.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 3, 'Adequate', 'Demonstrates 2+ dimensions — e.g., communicated a patient concern AND took direction constructively. Real examples, basic teamwork.', 2, 'Real examples of basic teamwork in 2+ dimensions.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 4, 'Strong', 'Evidence across 3+ dimensions. Accurate communication in high-stakes, takes direction, coordinates, navigates disagreements. Communication = safety.', 3, 'High-stakes communication. Coordination and conflict navigation.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 4 dimensions with patterns. Catches errors through communication, adapts style, handles conflict maturely. Makes the team better.', 4, 'Pattern evidence. Makes the team better.'),
-- CNA: Handling Difficult Situations ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000024001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Can''t describe a difficult situation, or suggests they''d panic, shut down, or escalate emotionally.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000024002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 2, 'Minimal', '1 dimension — usually "I stayed calm" without detail. Can''t explain de-escalation, help-seeking, or processing.', 1, '1 dimension without detail.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000024003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 3, 'Adequate', '2+ dimensions — stayed composed AND de-escalated, or got help AND processed afterward. Single incident.', 2, 'Single incident with 2+ dimensions.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000024004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 4, 'Strong', 'Evidence across 3+ dimensions. Composure, specific de-escalation, good boundary judgment, way to process. Explains thinking.', 3, 'Specific techniques. Good judgment. Explains thinking.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000024005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 4 dimensions across multiple situations. Clear approach, specific techniques, strong judgment, healthy processing. Shows growth and resilience.', 4, 'Multiple situations. Growth and resilience.'),
-- HK: Attention to Detail ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000031001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Can''t describe what thorough work looks like or why it matters. Vague answers. No process, self-checking, or personal standards.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000031002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 2, 'Minimal', 'General claim about being detail-oriented. 1 dimension. Can''t describe process, how they catch mistakes, or what "done right" means to them.', 1, 'General claim. 1 dimension only.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000031003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 3, 'Adequate', '2+ dimensions — describes specific process AND gives example of catching/fixing something. Real awareness of standards.', 2, 'Specific process with real awareness of standards.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000031004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 4, 'Strong', 'Evidence across 3+ dimensions. Systematic process, self-checks, understands why details matter in context, genuine care about quality.', 3, 'Systematic process with contextual understanding.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000031005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 4 dimensions as a pattern. Clear process, catches own mistakes, understands downstream impact. Takes visible pride. May improve processes.', 4, 'Pattern evidence. Visible pride. Process improvement.'),
-- HK: Reliability & Work Ethic ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000032001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Vague or contradictory answers. Can''t provide examples in any dimension. May blame external factors.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000032002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 2, 'Minimal', 'Good intentions, 1 dimension only. Evidence is thin. Follow-ups stay surface-level.', 1, 'Thin evidence. 1 dimension only.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000032003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 3, 'Adequate', '2+ dimensions — consistent attendance AND managing workload independently or communicating proactively. Specific, believable.', 2, 'Specific and believable in 2+ dimensions.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000032004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 4, 'Strong', 'Pattern across 3+ dimensions including independent work. Manages consistency, mistakes, communication, and priorities without oversight.', 3, 'Independent work management without oversight.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000032005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 5 dimensions. Reliability as personal value. Manages competing priorities, stays disciplined, maintains quality when no one''s checking.', 5, 'All 5 dimensions. Quality without supervision.'),
-- HK: Professionalism & Discretion ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000033001', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 1, 'No Evidence', 'Can''t articulate why discretion matters. Casual attitudes toward privacy or boundaries.', 0, 'No evidence across any dimension.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000033002', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 2, 'Minimal', 'General privacy statement. 1 dimension. Can''t describe a situation where discretion mattered or handle a scenario.', 1, 'General statement. 1 dimension only.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000033003', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 3, 'Adequate', '2+ dimensions — respecting personal space AND handling an uncomfortable scenario. Real awareness, hypothetical examples OK for entry-level.', 2, 'Real awareness. Hypotheticals OK for entry-level.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000033004', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 4, 'Strong', 'Evidence across 3+ dimensions. Boundary awareness, appropriate interactions, confidentiality instinct, composure. Articulates the "why" — trust is foundational.', 3, 'Articulates why trust is foundational.'), ('d0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000033005', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 5, 'Exceptional', 'All 4 dimensions with conviction. Clear personal code. Navigates awkward situations with grace. Professionalism = trustworthiness. Handles edge cases.', 4, 'Clear personal code. Grace under pressure. Edge cases.');

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Seed question packages (~31 total across all competencies)
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO question_packages (id, competency_id, package_key, label, is_default, description, best_for, primary_question_text, primary_question_design_note) VALUES -- CG: Empathy & Compassion ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001101', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'pkg_cg_empathy_a', 'Package A', true, 'Story-based. Works for candidates with or without formal experience.', '["experienced_candidates", "entry_level"]', 'Tell me about someone you''ve taken care of — a family member, a friend, or in a previous job. What did you do for them, and why did it matter to you?', 'Open-ended story prompt. Designed for candidates who may not have formal caregiving experience. Strong answers naturally reveal perspective-taking, responsiveness, and personal motivation.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001102', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'pkg_cg_empathy_b', 'Package B', false, 'Philosophy-first. Reveals mindset before stories. Good for career changers.', '["career_changers", "philosophy_oriented"]', 'What does it mean to really care for someone — not just help them, but genuinely care? How have you shown that?', 'Philosophy-first. Reveals mindset before stories. Good for career changers.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001103', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000011', 'pkg_cg_empathy_c', 'Package C', false, 'Scenario-based. Tests instincts. Ideal for zero-experience candidates.', '["zero_experience", "scenario_based"]', 'Imagine you''re caring for an elderly person who''s having a really bad day — they''re frustrated, in pain, and don''t want help. What do you do?', 'Scenario-based. Tests instincts. Ideal for zero-experience candidates.'),
-- CG: Reliability & Accountability ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001201', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 'pkg_cg_reliability_a', 'Package A', true, 'Definition + story. Broad, inviting.', '["general", "entry_level"]', 'What does being dependable mean to you? Can you give me an example of a time you had to really show up for someone — whether that was a family member, a friend, or a previous employer?', 'Broader than attendance. Invites candidate to define dependability, then ground it in a story. Strong answers touch consistency, follow-through, and ownership naturally.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001202', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 'pkg_cg_reliability_b', 'Package B', false, 'Ownership-first. Direct, tests honesty. Strong candidates own it.', '["ownership_focused", "direct"]', 'Tell me about a time you dropped the ball — missed something, showed up late, forgot a task. What happened and what did you do?', 'Ownership-first. Direct, tests honesty. Strong candidates own it.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001203', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000012', 'pkg_cg_reliability_c', 'Package C', false, 'Stakes-first. Emphasizes client dependency. Good for live-in or dedicated caregiver roles.', '["dedicated_caregiver", "live_in"]', 'The person you''d be caring for depends on you every single day. How do you make sure you''re someone people can count on?', 'Stakes-first. Emphasizes client dependency. Good for live-in or dedicated caregiver roles.'),
-- CG: Problem Solving Under Pressure ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001301', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 'pkg_cg_problem_a', 'Package A', true, 'Broad, works for any experience level.', '["general", "entry_level"]', 'Tell me about a time something went wrong unexpectedly — at work, at home, anywhere. What happened, and what did you do?', 'Broad enough for entry-level candidates without work experience. Strong answers reveal assessment, decision-making, and communication.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001302', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 'pkg_cg_problem_b', 'Package B', false, 'Scenario-based, healthcare-specific. Tests instincts and prioritization in a care emergency.', '["healthcare_specific", "scenario_based"]', 'If you were caring for someone and they suddenly fell or became unresponsive, what would you do first?', 'Scenario-based, healthcare-specific. Tests instincts and prioritization in a care emergency.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001303', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000013', 'pkg_cg_problem_c', 'Package C', false, 'Independence-focused. Good for roles where the caregiver is alone with the client.', '["independent_roles", "solo_caregiver"]', 'Tell me about a time you had to make a quick decision without being able to ask someone for help. What was the situation?', 'Independence-focused. Good for roles where the caregiver is alone with the client.'),
-- CNA: Patient Care Mindset ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002101', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 'pkg_cna_patientcare_a', 'Package A', true, 'Story-based. Best for candidates with some care experience.', '["experienced_candidates", "general_healthcare"]', 'Tell me about a patient or person you cared for who really stuck with you. What was the situation, and what did you do for them?', 'Story-based. Strong candidates naturally reveal dignity, attentiveness, clinical awareness, and emotional handling.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002102', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 'pkg_cna_patientcare_b', 'Package B', false, 'Dignity-first. Good for memory care or end-of-life settings.', '["memory_care", "end_of_life"]', 'What does it mean to you to treat a patient with dignity? Can you give me an example?', 'Dignity-first. Good for memory care or end-of-life settings.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002103', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 'pkg_cna_patientcare_c', 'Package C', false, 'Scenario-based. Good for entry-level with no experience. Tests instincts.', '["zero_experience", "scenario_based"]', 'If you noticed a patient seemed different today — quieter, not eating, or just not themselves — what would you do?', 'Scenario-based. Good for entry-level with no experience. Tests instincts.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002104', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000021', 'pkg_cna_patientcare_d', 'Package D', false, 'Philosophy-based. Reveals mindset. Good for career switchers into healthcare.', '["career_changers", "philosophy_oriented"]', 'What''s the difference between taking care of someone and just doing tasks for them?', 'Philosophy-based. Reveals mindset. Good for career switchers into healthcare.'),
-- CNA: Reliability & Accountability ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002201', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 'pkg_cna_reliability_a', 'Package A', true, 'Definition + story. The "job like this" connects to patient safety.', '["general", "patient_safety_focused"]', 'What does being dependable mean to you in a job like this? Can you give me an example of a time you had to really show up for someone — whether that was a patient, a team, or a previous employer?', 'Definition + story. The phrase "a job like this" connects reliability to patient care stakes.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002202', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 'pkg_cna_reliability_b', 'Package B', false, 'Ownership-first. Tests honesty and accountability directly.', '["ownership_focused", "direct"]', 'Tell me about a time you dropped the ball at work — missed something, showed up late, forgot a task. What happened and what did you do about it?', 'Ownership-first. Tests honesty and accountability directly.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002203', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000022', 'pkg_cna_reliability_c', 'Package C', false, 'Stakes-first. Emphasizes patient safety connection.', '["patient_safety_focused", "high_stakes"]', 'People are counting on you every single shift in this role. How do you make sure you''re someone people can count on?', 'Stakes-first. Emphasizes patient safety connection.'),
-- CNA: Teamwork & Communication ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002301', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 'pkg_cna_teamwork_a', 'Package A', true, 'Open-ended. Candidate picks the story — their choice is revealing.', '["general", "open_ended"]', 'As a CNA, you''re working closely with nurses, other aides, and families every day. Tell me about a time when good communication — or bad communication — really made a difference in how things went.', 'Open — candidate picks the story. Their choice reveals which dimensions they naturally think about.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002302', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 'pkg_cna_teamwork_b', 'Package B', false, 'Process-focused. Daily coordination habits vs. critical incidents.', '["process_focused", "daily_operations"]', 'Describe how you work with the other people on your team during a typical shift. How do you stay on the same page?', 'Process-focused. Daily coordination habits vs. critical incidents.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002303', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000023', 'pkg_cna_teamwork_c', 'Package C', false, 'Feedback-first. Tests coachability. Good for strict protocol environments.', '["coachability", "strict_protocols"]', 'Tell me about a time you got feedback from a supervisor that was hard to hear. How did you respond?', 'Feedback-first. Tests coachability. Good for strict protocol environments.'),
-- CNA: Handling Difficult Situations ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002401', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 'pkg_cna_difficult_a', 'Package A', true, 'Empathetic, broad. Creates safe space for vulnerability.', '["general", "empathetic"]', 'This kind of work can be really tough sometimes — difficult patients, stressful moments, things that are hard to see. Can you tell me about a time you faced something really challenging on the job?', 'Empathetic, broad. Creates safe space for vulnerability. Lets candidates define "challenging."'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002402', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 'pkg_cna_difficult_b', 'Package B', false, 'De-escalation-first. Good for challenging patient populations.', '["challenging_patients", "de_escalation"]', 'Have you ever had to deal with someone who was upset, angry, or confused? Walk me through what happened.', 'De-escalation-first. Good for challenging patient populations.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002403', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000024', 'pkg_cna_difficult_c', 'Package C', false, 'Resilience-first. Good for hospice, memory care — high emotional load roles.', '["hospice", "memory_care", "high_emotional_load"]', 'In healthcare, you sometimes see things that are hard. How do you take care of yourself so you can keep showing up for your patients?', 'Resilience-first. Good for hospice, memory care — high emotional load roles.'),
-- HK: Attention to Detail ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003101', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 'pkg_hk_attention_a', 'Package A', true, 'Process-focused. Reveals systematic thinking and personal standards.', '["general", "process_focused"]', 'When you finish cleaning a room or a space, how do you know it''s done right? Walk me through what you check for.', 'Process-focused. Strong candidates describe a systematic approach (process discipline), specific standards (awareness), and self-checking.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003102', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 'pkg_hk_attention_b', 'Package B', false, 'Standards-first. Gets at personal quality bar. Good for luxury hospitality.', '["luxury_hospitality", "high_standards"]', 'What''s the difference between a room that''s ''clean enough'' and one that''s really done well? What details matter to you?', 'Standards-first. Gets at personal quality bar. Good for luxury hospitality.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003103', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000031', 'pkg_hk_attention_c', 'Package C', false, 'Story-based. Surfaces real examples of noticing details. Works for any experience level.', '["entry_level", "story_based"]', 'Tell me about a time you caught something that someone else might have missed — at work or even at home.', 'Story-based. Surfaces real examples of noticing details. Works for any experience level.'),
-- HK: Reliability & Work Ethic ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003201', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'pkg_hk_reliability_a', 'Package A', true, 'Leads with independent work management — the unique housekeeping dimension.', '["general", "independent_work"]', 'In housekeeping, you''re often working on your own without someone checking in. How do you stay on top of your work and make sure everything gets done?', 'Leads with independent work management — the unique housekeeping dimension. Opens into follow-through, consistency, and communication naturally.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003202', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'pkg_hk_reliability_b', 'Package B', false, 'Values-first. Lets candidate define work ethic, then back it up.', '["values_focused", "general"]', 'What does a good work ethic look like to you? Can you give me an example of a time you really demonstrated that?', 'Values-first. Lets candidate define work ethic, then back it up.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003203', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000032', 'pkg_hk_reliability_c', 'Package C', false, 'Pressure-based. Tests prioritization and communication under real constraints.', '["pressure_based", "prioritization"]', 'Tell me about a day at work when everything went sideways — too much to do, not enough time, unexpected problems. How did you handle it?', 'Pressure-based. Tests prioritization and communication under real constraints.'),
-- HK: Professionalism & Discretion ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003301', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 'pkg_hk_professionalism_a', 'Package A', true, 'Reflective. Reveals how they frame the trust inherent in the role.', '["general", "reflective"]', 'You''re going into people''s personal spaces every day — their rooms, their belongings. How do you think about that responsibility?', 'Reflective prompt. Reveals boundary awareness and confidentiality instinct through how they frame the responsibility.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003302', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 'pkg_hk_professionalism_b', 'Package B', false, 'Scenario-based. Concrete, testable. Reveals instincts immediately.', '["scenario_based", "concrete"]', 'What would you do if you found something personal or valuable in a room you were cleaning — like cash, jewelry, or medication?', 'Scenario-based. Concrete, testable. Reveals instincts immediately.'), ('e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000003303', 'b0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000000033', 'pkg_hk_professionalism_c', 'Package C', false, 'Interaction-first. Tests social awareness and adaptability. Good for residential care.', '["residential_care", "social_awareness"]', 'How do you handle interacting with the people whose spaces you''re cleaning? Some people want to chat, some want to be left alone.', 'Interaction-first. Tests social awareness and adaptability. Good for residential care.');

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Seed follow-up rules with conditional targeting logic for Package A defaults (62 rules total)

INSERT INTO follow_up_rules (id, question_package_id, priority, conditions) VALUES -- CG: Empathy A ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011011', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001101', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"perspective_taking","ask":"What do you think that experience was like for them? What did they need most?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"responsiveness","ask":"Was there a moment where you noticed something was off and decided to step in? What happened?"},{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"Can you give me a specific example of something you did that really made a difference for that person?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011012', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001101', 2, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"emotional_resilience","ask":"Taking care of someone can be draining. What happened?"},{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"Can you give me a specific example of something you did that really made a difference for that person?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000011022', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001102', 2, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"emotional_resilience","ask":"Taking care of someone can be draining. How do you keep yourself from burning out?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"adaptability_to_individuals","ask":"Do you find you adjust how you care for different people, or is your approach pretty consistent?"},{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"Is caring for people something you''ve done a lot, or was that a unique situation?"}]'),
-- CG: Reliability A ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012011', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001201', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"ownership","ask":"Nobody''s perfect — can you tell me about a time something didn''t go as planned? What did you do about it?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication","ask":"When something comes up and you can''t make it or you''re running behind, how do you handle letting people know?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"Beyond being there on time, how do you make sure things you''re responsible for actually get done completely?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012012', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001201', 2, '[{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"Is that something you do consistently, or was that more of a one-time situation?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"When you''re given a list of things to do, how do you make sure everything gets done — especially when things get busy?"}]'), -- CG: Reliability B ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012021', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001202', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"ownership","ask":"Nobody''s perfect — can you tell me about a time something didn''t go as planned? What did you do about it?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication","ask":"When something comes up and you can''t make it or you''re running behind, how do you handle letting people know?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"Beyond being there on time, how do you make sure things you''re responsible for actually get done completely?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012022', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001202', 2, '[{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"Is that something you do consistently, or was that more of a one-time situation?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"When you''re given a list of things to do, how do you make sure everything gets done — especially when things get busy?"}]'), -- CG: Reliability C ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012031', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001203', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"ownership","ask":"Nobody''s perfect — can you tell me about a time something didn''t go as planned? What did you do about it?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication","ask":"When something comes up and you can''t make it or you''re running behind, how do you handle letting people know?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"Beyond being there on time, how do you make sure things you''re responsible for actually get done completely?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000012032', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001203', 2, '[{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"Is that something you do consistently, or was that more of a one-time situation?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"When you''re given a list of things to do, how do you make sure everything gets done — especially when things get busy?"}]'),
-- CG: Problem Solving A/B/C ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000013011', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000001301', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"assessment","ask":"Before you acted, did you take a moment to figure out what was actually going on? Walk me through your thinking."},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication_during_situation","ask":"Did you tell anyone else what was happening? -- CNA: Patient Care A/B/C/D ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000021011', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002101', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"clinical_awareness","ask":"In that situation, were there things you needed to watch for or report from a care perspective?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"patient_dignity","ask":"What was that person like? -- CNA: Reliability A/B/C ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022011', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002201', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"ownership","ask":"Nobody''s perfect — can you tell me about a time something didn''t go as planned at work? What did you do about it?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication","ask":"When you''re running behind or something comes up, how do you handle letting people know?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"Beyond being there on time, how do you make sure things you''re responsible for actually get done completely?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022012', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002201', 2, '[{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"You mentioned that. Is that something you do consistently, or was that more of a one-time situation?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"When you''re given a list of tasks for a shift, how do you make sure everything gets done — especially when things get busy?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022021', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002202', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"ownership","ask":"Nobody''s perfect — can you tell me about a time something didn''t go as planned at work? What did you do about it?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication","ask":"When you''re running behind or something comes up, how do you handle letting people know?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"Beyond being there on time, how do you make sure things you''re responsible for actually get done completely?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022022', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002202', 2, '[{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"You mentioned that. Is that something you do consistently, or was that more of a one-time situation?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"When you''re given a list of tasks for a shift, how do you make sure everything gets done — especially when things get busy?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022031', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002203', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"ownership","ask":"Nobody''s perfect — can you tell me about a time something didn''t go as planned at work? What did you do about it?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"communication","ask":"When you''re running behind or something comes up, how do you handle letting people know?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"Beyond being there on time, how do you make sure things you''re responsible for actually get done completely?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000022032', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002203', 2, '[{"if_no_pattern":true,"ask":"You mentioned that. Is that something you do consistently, or was that more of a one-time situation?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"follow_through","ask":"When you''re given a list of tasks for a shift, how do you make sure everything gets done — especially when things get busy?"}]'),
-- CNA: Teamwork A/B/C ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023011', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002301', 1, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"receiving_direction","ask":"What about the other direction — when a nurse or supervisor gives you feedback or changes your plan, how do you handle that?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"coordination","ask":"In a busy shift with a lot going on, how do you make sure nothing falls through the cracks between you and the rest of the team?"},{"if_dimension_missing":"navigating_conflict","ask":"Has there been a time where there was a disagreement or miscommunication with a coworker? How''d you work through it?"}]'), ('f0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000023012', 'e0000001-0000-4000-8000-000000002301', 2, '[{"if_dimension_missing":"navigating_conflict","ask":"What about a time you and a coworker saw things differently?
